executionBackend.ownership: The backend owns ComfyUI process supervision, GPU queueing, warmup, output transport and scale-out. GameCastle owns authorization, approved deployment projection, asset acceptance, revision and runtime binding.
executionBackend.deploymentRule: Backend may only receive an image containing the approved model, custom-node and workflow set; it must not be exposed directly to product callers.

deploymentAttestation.rule: must exactly match the approved deployment registry entry

output.image: PNG bytes are fetched only from the worker output endpoint and validated locally before candidate materialization
output.review: structured JSON only; worker receipt must not include raw prompt, image bytes, URL, key, or local path
